docs.title: Django Facile
docs.text: Django Facile is a developer-focused CLI tool designed to simplify and automate Django project setup, configuration, and workflows.

docs.title: Why Django Facile?
docs.text:
Setting up Django projects repeatedly involves: - manual configuration - environment setup - repetitive commands - Switching to Production mode

Django Facile solves this by providing a single CLI interface.

docs.title: Key Features
docs.text:
• One-command project setup
  • Dev ↔ Prod environment switching
  • Built-in database migration workflow
  • Developer-friendly commands
  • Production-ready configuration
  • Automatically configured environment variables

docs.title: Quick Start
docs.text:
django-facile startproject myproject --env dev --db sqlite
cd myproject
django-facile run

docs.title: Commands
docs.text: ⚠️ Notes Use virtual environment (recommended) Ensure Python is added to PATH

docs.title: commands.md (Main professional section)
docs.text:
#  Command Reference

---

## 🏗 startproject

Create a new Django project.

```bash
django-facile startproject <project_name> --env dev --db sqlite

Create a new Django app

django-facile startapp <app_name>

docs.title: switch environment
docs.text:
django-facile switch-env dev   # to development
django-facile switch-env prod  # to production

docs.title: Start django development server
docs.text: django-facile run

docs.title: Makemigration & Migrate in one command
docs.text: django-facile migrate

docs.title: Create superuser
docs.text: django-facile superuser

docs.title: django shell for testing
docs.text: django-facile shell

docs.title: Validate project configuration
docs.text:
django-facile check
# for production validation
django-facile check --deploy

docs.title: Collect static files for production.
docs.text: django-facile collectstatic

docs.title: help
docs.text: django-facile --help

docs.title: version
docs.text: django-facile --version

docs.title: installation.md
docs.text:
#  Installation

---

## Create virtual env (Best Practice)
```bash
python -m venv venv

## activate venv
# for windows
venv/scripts/activate

# for linux 
source venv/bin/activate

docs.title: Install via pip
docs.text:
pip install django-facile

## Verify the installation
django-facile --help
## Check version
django-facile --version

docs.title: Project structure (After creating project)
docs.text: myproject/ ├── manage.py ├── settings/ ├── apps/ ├── urls.py ├── asgi.py ├── wsgi.py ├── .env ├── .gitignore

docs.title: NOTE:Dont try to run all these commmands at once(run one by one)
docs.text: ```bash

docs.title: Development workflow
docs.text: django-facile startproject myproject --env dev --db sqlite cd myproject django-facile startapp blog django-facile migrate django-facile run

docs.title: Production workflow
docs.text: django-facile switch-env prod django-facile migrate django-facile collectstatic django-facile check --deploy
